title: Montana's Variated Grass
description: A resource pack that adds variations to existing vanilla tall grass blocks!
body: This resource pack adds vanilla-style variation to tall grass and dry grass!! While not required, resource packs such as Vanilla Tweaks, Better Crops, and Awoolanche's packs definetly add a lot of synergistic textures I would recommend using! Feel Free to use this in any modpack or collection here on Modrinth!
